article_title: ASP.NET Core 面试 30 问：2026 年真会被问到的内部原理题
core_theme: ASP.NET Core 内部原理面试——6 大类别、30 道真题，考察开发者对托管、中间件管道、DI 生命周期、配置选项、过滤器和请求生命周期的理解深度
reader_takeaway: 读完能理解 ASP.NET Core 面试中真正会被问到的内部原理问题，知道每道题的机制、后果和常见错误答法
summary_angle: 从「面试问定义」到「面试问内部原理」的转变——不再是「什么是中间件」，而是「你的 CORS 为什么在高负载下消失」这类调试场景

information_blocks.source_anchor: Q5-Q10 中间件管道章节：中间件是 RequestDelegate 链，洋葱模型，顺序决定行为
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一个抽象的多层洋葱/管道结构，每层标注一个简洁的技术关键词

information_blocks.source_anchor: Q11-Q15 DI 生命周期章节：Transient/Scoped/Singleton 三种生命周期及俘虏依赖
information_blocks.visual_idea: 三个嵌套的时间环或容器，不同生命周期用不同颜色区分

information_blocks.source_anchor: Q25-Q30 请求生命周期章：HttpContext per-request，不能捕获，线程不绑定
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一条流动的请求路径箭头，跨越多个抽象线程/节点

main_metaphor: 洋葱式管道——请求层层深入又层层退出，每一层都是面试中一道关键题
primary_subject: 一个抽象的多层管道/圆环结构，中心是 ASP.NET Core 运行时核心
subject_action: 管道层从外到内依次展开，每层带有不同的技术关注点标签，体现「层层深入」的面试节奏
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: polished vertical-webtoon-inspired rendering adapted to a wide cover, clean gradients, sharp character shapes, glossy color blocks
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，本篇从 40 项风格池随机选中；条漫风格干净的渐变和锐利的形状适合表现分层管道结构，glossy color blocks 可强化信息块的视觉区分度
style_safety_note: 清单风格为泛类型描述，不涉及品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻
draft_goal: 第一轮先验证分层管道隐喻是否成立，三信息块是否清晰可辨识，韩漫条漫风的渐变和色块风格是否到位
revision_targets: 管道层次不够清晰，分层感不够强
信息块标签过于密集或太小
背景杂物太多干扰主焦点
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes the article. Theme: ASP.NET Core internals interview preparation — 30 questions across 6 categories testing deep understanding of the request pipeline, DI lifetimes, configuration, filters, and request lifecycle. The reader should quickly feel this is a structured, in-depth interview guide for experienced .NET developers.

Summary angle: The shift from definition-based interview questions to internals and debugging scenarios — not "what is middleware" but "why does your CORS break under load."
Narrative flow: layered reveal. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 2-4 supporting narrative beats. Each beat must map to the article's information blocks rather than generic decoration.
Information blocks:
- mechanism: Middleware pipeline as a RequestDelegate chain with onion model, order determines behavior → visual: abstract layered pipeline/onion rings → visible label: 中间件管道, numeric: ①
- mechanism: DI lifetimes — Transient/Scoped/Singleton and captive dependencies → visual: three nested rings/containers in different colors → visible label: DI 生命周期, numeric: ②
- evidence: Request lifecycle — HttpContext per-request, not capturable, no thread affinity → visual: a flowing request path arrow spanning multiple abstract nodes → visible label: 请求生命周期, numeric: ③

Main metaphor: The request pipeline as an onion — requests enter layer by layer and exit in reverse, each layer is a key interview question.
Subject: An abstract multi-layered pipeline/ring structure with the ASP.NET Core runtime core at center, layers unfolding from outside to inside, each bearing different technical concern labels representing the progressive interview rhythm.
Composition/framing: centered dominant subject. Prefer horizontal or radial storytelling that stays legible in a wide cover.
Style/medium: combine conceptual editorial illustration with the selected visual style descriptor: polished vertical-webtoon-inspired rendering adapted to a wide cover, clean gradients, sharp character shapes, glossy color blocks. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong, and clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: deep blue-grey, cyan-blue, warm orange, white.
Visible text policy: allow only 3 short Chinese labels: 中间件管道, DI 生命周期, 请求生命周期, each with a number ① ② ③. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes, no fake architecture node names.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: floating chips, meaningless code rain, neon city backgrounds, generic robot poses, cyberpunk purple-blue light pollution, massive HUD overlays, fake UI labels, fake dashboards, fake terminal output.
